mission.title: podman-container-tools: Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable
mission.description: Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable. This issue affects 8+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for error: `1 (30 days)`

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
podman fails to start

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

**Description**

```
Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file:

steps.title: Apply the fix for Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr:…
steps.description:
After a failed start, we can run into (somehow inconsistent) states where the machine won't start because a previous QEMU process is still running and the PID file is being used.  Stop didn't resolve the issue as this state wasn't detected.

Allow to recover from this state by a) detecting it
```yaml
Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: cannot create PID file: Cannot lock pid file: Resource temporarily unavailable
```

steps.title: Confirm Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code 1,… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that `1 (30 days)` no longer appears.

resolution.summary: After a failed start, we can run into (somehow inconsistent) states where the machine won't start because a previous QEMU process is still running and the PID file is being used.  Stop didn't resolve the issue as this state wasn't detected.
